EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.name} started a session in the background mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} started a session in Thick Client mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} started a session in Thin Client mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.id} started a session in the background mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} started a session via a COM connection on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} started a session in Designer mode on host {event_src.host}
